tool_args.label: Safe, Accessible, and Modern Fare Gate RFI

payload.project_name: Safe, Accessible, and Modern Fare Gate RFI
payload.description: 12 RFI submissions received; in-lab testing summer 2024, in-system testing in 2025
Long-term fare gate strategy as part of the 2025-2029 Capital Program

warnings: project.program is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Program names caused identity overmerge; they are relation context, not strong project identity. Suggested relation: part_of_program.

payload.description: Created 15 Customer Service Centers and integrating with Fair Fares enrollment across all boroughs; equipping 15 CSCs for enrollment for Fair Fares with the City
Gate guards deployed at 22 stations led to an increase in paid ridership
Replaced 700+ locks to target 'ghost keys'
15-sec delayed egress pilot led to 7% lower evasion at 3 stations
Fixed back-cocking at over 1,400 turnstiles in 100+ stations
Turnstile fins decreased jumps by over 20% at 4 pilot stations

tool_args.label: Plan: Remove Back-Cocking at 60% of Stations

payload.description: Remove back-cocking at 60% of stations by 2024

tool_args.label: Plan: Expand Turnstile Fins to 10 More Stations

payload.description: Expand turnstile fins to 10 more stations in Q3 2024

tool_args.label: Plan: Pilot Re-activation of Gate Alarms

payload.description: Pilot re-activation of gate alarms at 14 stations
Begin roll-out of delayed egress everywhere it is safe to do so
Deploy new gates in at least 10 stations by 2024

payload.claim_text: Fare evasion calls for a holistic strategy
payload.description: MTA is deploying wide-ranging tactics to address the multiple causes of fare evasion
payload.subject: MTA fare evasion strategy

payload.claim_text: MTA's holistic fare evasion strategy has four pillars: Equity, Education, Enforcement, and Environment
payload.description: Equity: Better supporting New Yorkers who need help paying fares. Education: Communicating importance of fares on service. Enforcement: Data-driven focus on serious evaders. Environment: New technology and changes to physical entry.
